name: event-streaming-engine
description: Real-time notification and event streaming engine — NestJS + Kafka + Redis + WebSockets

scripts.start:all: concurrently -n producer,consumer,gateway -c blue,green,magenta "cd event-producer && npm run start:dev" "cd event-consumer && npm run start:dev" "cd notification-gateway && npm run start:dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd event-producer && npm install && cd ../event-consumer && npm install && cd ../notification-gateway && npm install
scripts.build:all: cd event-producer && npm run build && cd ../event-consumer && npm run build && cd ../notification-gateway && npm run build
